title: JDK's Utilities Core 2
description: Core of JDK's Utilities mods series
body:
##  Core of JDK's Utilities mod series, which adds necessary blocks, items and tags for all mods form this series.

> For JDK Core 2 - 1.0c
> 
[JDK's Mining Utilities 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/jdk-mu2) v1.1a

[JDK's Mob Grinding Utilities 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/jdk-mgu) v1.0a

[JDK's Farming Utilities 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/jdk-fu) v1.0a

(Free use for modpacks)
